Chip Explorer v2.1.3.0

run_v213_prefill · prefill · throughput (±18%) AND thermal gate calibrated to A100/H100/MI300 · cumulative buildable library
Every chip passed first-order thermal / power-delivery / signal-integrity feasibility gates. Throughput and the thermal gate are calibrated to real silicon (throughput ±18% vs A100/H100/MI300; thermal validated vs H100/MI300 junction temps); power-delivery, signal-integrity and cost remain reduced-order — treat those absolute values as directional, calibration in progress. Drag a metric handle to filter; cross out a package value; the scatter and stats update live. Showing 6,000 of 71,897 buildable designs (Pareto frontier + stratified sample).
